outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated risk of volatility expansion due to structural negative GEX in monthly expiry, despite short-term positive gamma.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the 670 Gamma Flip. Dealers are long gamma intraday (positive GEX) but structurally short (negative GEX). Bearish skew and high PCR suggest heavy downside hedging. A break below 669.7 triggers instability.

levels.motivazione: Resonance level: High Call OI in 0DTE & Monthly. Aligns with Weekly/Monthly Max Pain (680-681). Strong magnetic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed: High positive GEX (1.11B) forces pinning despite bearish skew.
outlook.summary: Dealers are long gamma, incentivizing pinning near 600. The massive OI cluster at 600 acts as a gravitational anchor. Bearish metrics (Skew/PCR) suggest downside risk, but dealer hedging flows will suppress volatility unless 590 support breaks.

outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma regime (0DTE) with spot resting just above the Gamma Flip (6734). Dealers will suppress volatility, pinning price between 6734 and 6900. Bearish skew suggests downside protection is bid, but structural support is strong.

Monthly Mega Wall with 283k OI. Ultimate upside target and volatility cap.

Support structure at 24500-24200.
